bdo.dao

Class GenericDAO<T extends EntityObj,ID extends java.io.Serializable>

  • java.lang.Object
    • bdo.dao.GenericDAO<T,ID>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConfigGeraisDAO, ConfigMailDAO, FavoritoDAO, FormaContatoDAO, GrupoUsuariosDAO, LogExecutorTarefasDAO, LoginCalendarioDAO, LoginDAO, LoginEnderecoDAO, LoginPoliticaDAO, MsgUsuarioDAO, PainelDAO, PainelIndicadorDAO, PastaMsgUsuarioDAO, PreferenciaDAO, ProcessoDAO, RecursoPermDAO, ShortUrlMapDAO, SubprocessoDAO, TarefaDAO, TarefaExecucaoAnexoDAO, TarefaExecucaoDAO, TarefaExecucaoFormaContatoDAO, TarefaExecucaoValorDAO, TarefaFormaContatoDAO, TarefaMsgDAO, TarefaMsgVersaoDAO, TarefaVersaoDAO, TokenDAO, UsuarioDAO, VariavelScriptDAO, VisaoInicialDAO
